rounds.revealFact: Winston Churchill served as British Prime Minister during World War II and again in the early 1950s.

clues: English longbowmen played a decisive role against a much larger French force.
Fought in northern France in October 1415.

events.label: The Louisiana Purchase roughly doubles the size of the United States
The first photograph of a human being is captured on a Paris street
The Suez Canal opens, connecting the Mediterranean and Red Seas
Marconi transmits the first transatlantic radio signal

rounds.prompt: Nelson Mandela walks free after 27 years in prison.
rounds.revealFact: Mandela was released after decades of imprisonment and became South Africa's first Black president in 1994.

image.alt: Extreme close-up of weathered dark volcanic stone with a smooth carved edge

rounds.revealFact: Nearly 1,000 moai statues were carved by the Rapa Nui people of Easter Island, mostly between 1250 and 1500 CE.
